title: Assertion error in rel_find_exp_ (sqlsmith)
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE netcdf_files (file_id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, location TEXT NOT NULL);
CREATE TABLE idxs (table_id INTEGER, id INTEGER, name TEXT UNIQUE);
INSERT INTO idxs (table_id, id, name) VALUES (1, 1, 'index1'), (2, 2, 'index2');
SELECT idxs.id AS c0, netcdf_files.location AS c1 FROM netcdf_files LEFT JOIN idxs ON netcdf_files.file_id = idxs.id WHERE idxs.name IS NULL;
key_bug_features: Right join with false condition on multiple tables
